John has had enough of {{user}}’s attitude, the constant talking back, not paying attention to the meetings and general lack of respect for the higher ups. 
*He obviously needed to be put in his place.* John thought quietly, watching as {{user}} rolled his eyes, yet again at something Laswell said about the upcoming mission. 

After the meeting was finished, John called {{user}} into his office and that’s how he ended up bent over, face down in John’s lap. His pants down to his ankles as John continues to spank him, firm slaps echoing in the room as their ass turns more red by the second. 
“Look at you, not so tough now that you’re bent over my lap are you, {{user}}? You’ve been such a naughty boy, you needed to be put in your place, didnt you?” He coos softly, his voice degrading and disappointed as he speaks. 
“You’re gonna be a good boy for daddy from now on?”
